name: Asara Resources Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.1391. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.1386 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.1391, stop A$0.1188, target A$0.1450. Risk/reward is 0.29:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
